title: Formatting Text
subtitle: Make Your Text Beautiful!
overview: In this session, students will learn how to format text using different tools like bold, italic, underline, font size, colors, alignment, and styles in MS Word. Students will create attractive documents using formatting features.

images._note: Add photos from the actual session — computer lab photos, typing practice, formatting activities, and student work.

keyTopics: Bold Text — Makes text darker and important
Underline — Draws a line below text
Font Size — Increase or decrease text size
Text Color — Add colors to text
Create Attractive Documents using formatting tools

youtubeVideos.title: Formatting Text Practice Activity
youtubeVideos.desc: A beginner-friendly activity for practicing text formatting.

activity.title: Create a Beautiful School Notice
steps: Type a school notice or paragraph
Make the heading Bold and increase font size
Apply Italic and Underline to important words
Save the document with your name
Show your formatted document to the teacher

quiz.q: Which formatting option makes text darker and thicker?
quiz.explanation: Bold formatting makes text darker and more noticeable.

quiz.q: Which formatting style makes text slanted?
quiz.explanation: Italic text appears slanted and stylish.
Underline adds a line below the selected text.

quiz.q: Which option is used to change text size?
quiz.explanation: Font Size helps increase or decrease the size of text.

quiz.q: Which alignment places text in the middle of the page?
quiz.explanation: Center alignment places text in the center.

quiz.q: Which tool changes the color of text?
quiz.explanation: Text Color option changes the appearance color of text.

quiz.q: Which alignment keeps text evenly aligned on both sides?
quiz.explanation: Justify alignment makes both left and right edges neat.

quiz.q: What is the shortcut key for Bold in MS Word?
quiz.explanation: Ctrl + B is used for Bold formatting.

quiz.q: What is the shortcut key for Italic?
Which shortcut key is used for Underline?
Why do we use formatting in documents?
options: To make documents attractive and readable
quiz.explanation: Formatting improves appearance and readability of documents.

quiz.q: Which formatting tool highlights important text using color?
quiz.explanation: Highlight Text tool marks important words with color.

quiz.q: What happens when you increase font size?
quiz.explanation: Increasing font size makes text larger.

quiz.q: Which option helps copy formatting from one text to another?
quiz.explanation: Format Painter copies formatting styles quickly.

quiz.q: Which alignment is commonly used for titles and headings?
quiz.explanation: Center alignment is mostly used for titles and headings.
